file_name: Magenta Therapeutics, Inc. - Master Development and Manufacturing Agreement.txt

perturbation.original_text: 4.2 Invoicing and Payment. Unless specifically agreed otherwise in writing by the Parties, including as agreed in a Project Plan, (i) all invoices and payments hereunder shall be in U.S. Dollars, (ii) payments will be made payable to Bachem at the address set forth in applicable Project Plan(s), and (iii) all undisputed payments shall be made within [***] of receipt of invoice by Magenta.
perturbation.changed_text: 4.2 Invoicing and Payment. Unless specifically agreed otherwise in writing by the Parties, including as agreed in a Project Plan, (i) all invoices and payments hereunder shall be in U.S. Dollars, (ii) payments will be made payable to Bachem at the address set forth in applicable Project Plan(s), and (iii) all undisputed payments shall be made within 15 days of receipt of invoice by Magenta.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by specifying that all undisputed payments shall be made within '15 days' of receipt of invoice. This directly conflicts with Section 4.2's original clause of '[***] days', creating confusion about the payment deadline and potential disputes.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4.2 Invoicing and Payment. Unless specifically agreed otherwise in writing by the Parties, including as agreed in a Project Plan, (i) all invoices and payments hereunder shall be in U.S. Dollars, (ii) payments will be made payable to Bachem at the address set forth in applicable Project Plan(s), and (iii) all undisputed payments shall be made within 15 days of receipt of invoice by Magenta.
perturbation.justification: The changed text specifies a fixed payment deadline of '15 days', directly replacing the placeholder '[***] days' in Section 4.2. This creates a clear and direct conflict within the same section, making it an in-text contradiction because the original text left the payment deadline undefined. The contradicted text is the same section as the changed text, which indicates that the change indeed creates a contradiction. It adheres to the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition, where different sections (in this case, different versions of the same section) provide conflicting deadlines.
